_note: Dogfood scorecard — 4 commits HEAD~4..HEAD + 4 maturity-gap fixes. CI shell tests wired (was Owned, now Resolved). fqdn_registry 0 violations (was 4). coherence gate expanded to tests/gates/+tests/integration/.

originality._new_relationship_name: test<->script binding via shebang-based invocation (bash compat); SSH sign-off creates cryptographic relationship between approver identity and commit hash; fqdn_registry now the single source of truth for ALL Caddy-served FQDNs

tails.name: pnpm-lock.yaml: 3500-line lockfile delta inflates diff noise; not a behavioral change
tails._note: Severity 0: purely mechanical. Accepted as cost of deterministic dep pinning.

tails.name: macOS bash 3.2 compat: test_deploy_edge_cfg.sh must use shebang-exec not 'bash path'
tails._note: Mitigated by current impl. CI ubuntu bash 5 not affected.

tails.name: SSH sign-off (Option 1) gate falls to legacy AF_SIGNOFF when allowed_signers absent
tails._note: Owned: test_verify_signoff_cryptographic_* tests cover this boundary.

tails.name: Shell tests wired into GitHub Actions CI matrix (ci.yml shell-gate-tests job, one-gate-execution now depends on it)
tails._note: Resolved this session: added shell-gate-tests job to ci.yml. one-gate-execution needs: [scorecard-gate, shell-gate-tests].
